name: Vintner
ability: When you die at night, your alive neighbors swap characters. This can't create a good Demon.
otherNightReminder: If the Vintner died tonight, swap their alive neighbors' character tokens. Wake each neighbor 1 at a time & show the *YOU ARE* & their new character tokens.

jinxes.reason: If the Epidemic is in play, the Vinter may create a good Demon.
If the Moonlit is in play, the Vinter may create a good Demon.
